info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/lora/image-to-image
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/lora/image-to-image queue.

examples: Photo of a european medieval 40 year old queen, silver hair, highly detailed face, detailed eyes, head shot, intricate crown, age spots, wrinkles
Photo of a classic red mustang car parked in las vegas strip at night
prompt.description: The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
prompt.title: Prompt

noise_strength.description: The amount of noise to add to noise image for image. Only used if the image_url is provided. 1.0 is complete noise and 0 is no noise.
noise_strength.title: Noise Strength

tile_height.description: The size of the tiles to be used for the image generation.
tile_height.title: Tile Height

embeddings.description:
The embeddings to use for the image generation. Only a single embedding is supported at the moment.
            The embeddings will be used to map the tokens in the prompt to the embedding weights.
embeddings.title: Embeddings

ic_light_model_url.description: The URL of the IC Light model to use for the image generation.
ic_light_model_url.title: Ic Light Model Url

sigmas.description:
Optionally override the sigmas to use for the denoising process. Only works with schedulers which support the `sigmas` argument in their `set_sigmas` method.
            Defaults to not overriding, in which case the scheduler automatically sets the sigmas based on the `num_inference_steps` parameter.
            If set to a custom sigma schedule, the `num_inference_steps` parameter will be ignored. Cannot be set if `timesteps` is set.

ip_adapter.description: The IP adapter to use for the image generation.
ip_adapter.title: Ip Adapter

scheduler.description: Scheduler / sampler to use for the image denoising process.
scheduler.title: Scheduler

loras.description:
The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
loras.title: Loras

image_encoder_weight_name.description: The weight name of the image encoder model to use for the image generation.
image_encoder_weight_name.title: Image Encoder Weight Name

guidance_scale.description:
The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
guidance_scale.title: Guidance scale (CFG)

tile_stride_width.description: The stride of the tiles to be used for the image generation.
tile_stride_width.title: Tile Stride Width

debug_per_pass_latents.description: If set to true, the latents will be saved for debugging per pass.
debug_per_pass_latents.title: Debug Per Pass Latents

image_encoder_subfolder.description: The subfolder of the image encoder model to use for the image generation.
image_encoder_subfolder.title: Image Encoder Subfolder

image_url.description: URL of image to use for image to image/inpainting.
image_url.title: Image Url

prompt_weighting.description:
If set to true, the prompt weighting syntax will be used.
            Additionally, this will lift the 77 token limit by averaging embeddings.
prompt_weighting.title: Prompt Weighting

variant.description: The variant of the model to use for huggingface models, e.g. 'fp16'.
variant.title: Variant

model_name.description: URL or HuggingFace ID of the base model to generate the image.
model_name.title: Model Name

seed.description:
The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
seed.title: Seed

controlnet_guess_mode.description: If set to true, the controlnet will be applied to only the conditional predictions.
controlnet_guess_mode.title: Controlnet Guess Mode

timesteps.description:
Optionally override the timesteps to use for the denoising process. Only works with schedulers which support the `timesteps` argument in their `set_timesteps` method.
            Defaults to not overriding, in which case the scheduler automatically sets the timesteps based on the `num_inference_steps` parameter.
            If set to a custom timestep schedule, the `num_inference_steps` parameter will be ignored. Cannot be set if `sigmas` is set.

ic_light_model_background_image_url.description:
The URL of the IC Light model background image to use for the image generation.
            Make sure to use a background compatible with the model.
ic_light_model_background_image_url.title: Ic Light Model Background Image Url

rescale_betas_snr_zero.description: Whether to set the rescale_betas_snr_zero option or not for the sampler
rescale_betas_snr_zero.title: Rescale Betas Snr Zero

tile_width.description: The size of the tiles to be used for the image generation.
tile_width.title: Tile Width

prediction_type.description:
The type of prediction to use for the image generation.
            The `epsilon` is the default.
prediction_type.title: Prediction Type

eta.description: The eta value to be used for the image generation.
eta.title: Eta

image_encoder_path.description: The path to the image encoder model to use for the image generation.
image_encoder_path.title: Image Encoder Path

enable_safety_checker.description: If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
enable_safety_checker.title: Enable Safety Checker

image_format.description: The format of the generated image.
image_format.title: Image Format

examples: cartoon, painting, illustration, worst quality, low quality, normal quality
negative_prompt.description:
The negative prompt to use.Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

num_images.description:
Number of images to generate in one request. Note that the higher the batch size,
            the longer it will take to generate the images.
num_images.title: Number of images

debug_latents.description: If set to true, the latents will be saved for debugging.
debug_latents.title: Debug Latents

ic_light_image_url.description: The URL of the IC Light model image to use for the image generation.
ic_light_image_url.title: Ic Light Image Url

unet_name.description: URL or HuggingFace ID of the custom U-Net model to use for the image generation.
unet_name.title: Unet Name

clip_skip.description:
Skips part of the image generation process, leading to slightly different results.
            This means the image renders faster, too.
clip_skip.title: Clip Skip

tile_stride_height.description: The stride of the tiles to be used for the image generation.
tile_stride_height.title: Tile Stride Height

controlnets.description:
The control nets to use for the image generation. You can use any number of control nets
            and they will be applied to the image at the specified timesteps.
controlnets.title: Controlnets

num_inference_steps.description:
Increasing the amount of steps tells Stable Diffusion that it should take more steps
            to generate your final result which can increase the amount of detail in your image.
num_inference_steps.title: Number of inference steps

seed.description:
Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
seed.title: Seed

has_nsfw_concepts.description: Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
has_nsfw_concepts.title: Has Nsfw Concepts

debug_per_pass_latents.description: The latents saved for debugging per pass.

tokens.description: The tokens to map the embedding weights to. Use these tokens in your prompts.
tokens.title: Tokens

path.description: URL or the path to the embedding weights.
path.title: Path

method.description:
The method to use for the sigmas. If set to 'custom', the sigmas will be set based
            on the provided sigmas schedule in the `array` field.
            Defaults to 'default' which means the scheduler will use the sigmas of the scheduler.
method.title: Method

array.description: Sigmas schedule to be used if 'custom' method is selected.
array.title: Array

unconditional_noising_factor.description: The factor to apply to the unconditional noising of the IP adapter.
unconditional_noising_factor.title: Unconditional Noising Factor

scale_json.description:
The scale of the IP adapter weight. This is used to scale the IP adapter weight
            before merging it with the base model.
scale_json.title: Scale Json

path.description: URL or the path to the IP adapter weights.
path.title: Path

image_projection_shortcut.description:
The value to set the image projection shortcut to. For FaceID plus V1 models,
            this should be set to False. For FaceID plus V2 models, this should be set to True.
            Default is True.
image_projection_shortcut.title: Image Projection Shortcut

ip_adapter_image_url.description: URL of the image to be used as the IP adapter.
ip_adapter_image_url.title: Ip Adapter Image Url

ip_adapter_mask_url.description: The mask to use for the IP adapter. When using a mask, the ip-adapter image size and the mask size must be the same
ip_adapter_mask_url.title: Ip Adapter Mask Url

model_subfolder.description: Subfolder in the model directory where the IP adapter weights are stored.
model_subfolder.title: Model Subfolder

scale.description:
The scale of the IP adapter weight. This is used to scale the IP adapter weight
            before merging it with the base model.
scale.title: Scale

insight_face_model_path.description: URL or the path to the InsightFace model weights.
insight_face_model_path.title: Insight Face Model Path

path.description: URL or the path to the LoRA weights.
path.title: Path

scale.description:
The scale of the LoRA weight. This is used to scale the LoRA weight
            before merging it with the base model.
scale.title: Scale

method.description:
The method to use for the timesteps. If set to 'array', the timesteps will be set based
            on the provided timesteps schedule in the `array` field.
            Defaults to 'default' which means the scheduler will use the `num_inference_steps` parameter.
method.title: Method

array.description: Timesteps schedule to be used if 'custom' method is selected.
array.title: Array

conditioning_scale.description:
The scale of the control net weight. This is used to scale the control net weight
            before merging it with the base model.
conditioning_scale.title: Conditioning Scale

path.description: URL or the path to the control net weights.
path.title: Path

ip_adapter_index.description: The index of the IP adapter to be applied to the controlnet. This is only needed for InstantID ControlNets.
ip_adapter_index.title: Ip Adapter Index

end_percentage.description: The percentage of the image to end applying the controlnet in terms of the total timesteps.
end_percentage.title: End Percentage

config_url.description: optional URL to the controlnet config.json file.
config_url.title: Config Url

image_url.description: URL of the image to be used as the control net.
image_url.title: Image Url

variant.description: The optional variant if a Hugging Face repo key is used.
variant.title: Variant

mask_url.description: The mask to use for the controlnet. When using a mask, the control image size and the mask size must be the same and divisible by 32.
mask_url.title: Mask Url

start_percentage.description: The percentage of the image to start applying the controlnet in terms of the total timesteps.
start_percentage.title: Start Percentage

height.description: The height of the image in pixels.
height.title: Height

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.
file_size.title: File Size

file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.
file_name.title: File Name

content_type.description: The mime type of the file.
content_type.title: Content Type

url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.
url.title: Url

width.description: The width of the image in pixels.
width.title: Width

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.
file_size.title: File Size

file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.
file_name.title: File Name

content_type.description: The mime type of the file.
content_type.title: Content Type

url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.
url.title: Url

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.
